config.wildcardResolutionDescription: Enable wildcard domain resolution for subscriptions
config.updateIntervalDescription: After import, clients will auto-update subscription on this schedule. 0 = disabled. Smart UA detection: Clash family / Hiddify / Mihomo Party use Profile-Update-Interval header; Surge / Stash use #!MANAGED-CONFIG injection; v2rayN / Shadowrocket / QuanX / Loon do not support — user must set manually.
